title: Palm Springs Mid-Century Gallery Wall Art | Retro Desert Oasis Print Set | Vintage Poolside Architecture Digital Download
description:
Bring the sun-drenched glamour of 1960s Palm Springs right into your living space. This curated gallery wall set captures the essence of desert modernism, featuring iconic breeze blocks, vintage poolside lounging, and pastel-hued retro architecture. It is the perfect collection for infusing your home with a warm, sophisticated, and effortlessly cool mid-century aesthetic.

Instantly download, print, and frame this cohesive 6-piece art collection. Your purchase includes high-resolution 300 DPI JPG files in five different aspect ratios, ensuring a flawless, gallery-quality finish whether you are printing small accent pieces or large statement artwork for your living room.

Upon purchase, you will receive a secure link to download your files instantly, along with an easy-to-follow sizing guide to help you create the perfect custom arrangement. Please note: This is a premium digital download; no physical items will be shipped.
